notes: PBRS delta-progress reward (progress_coef=50) disrupted hover (2.92s vs 29.98s) without achieving gates. Model attempts lateral movement but crashes — slightly better than exp_031 (2.02s). The progress reward successfully broke the hover optimum but the model hasn't learned stable navigation yet. May need: (1) more training steps, (2) higher survive_coef to penalize crashes more, or (3) truncation fix (exp_033) to improve value estimates near episode boundaries.
